asset_groups.name: Wave Graphic Device Family
asset_groups.semantics: Fluid wave forms in two approved colorways (Sunshine/Gold, Sky Blue/Deep Blue), each available in long and short variants; construction layers a 70%-transparent top wave over a base wave.

assets.description: Branded orange/yellow gradient background PNG used as the full-width background for the Gradient Callout CTA section; must not be re-hosted or recolored.

quotes: **Background** → the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px).

**Background image:** asset is `https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png` — do not re-host or recolor.

assets.description: Line icon rendered inside the white icon badge of the Icon Callout Box component (placeholder ICON_URL); must follow minimal line icon style with Brand Blue stroke, 48px inner size.
White rounded-square icon badge that straddles the left edge of the Icon Callout Box, mandatory drop shadow, mirrors the accent-shape radius at smaller scale (20px 4px 20px 4px).

quotes: **Icon badge** ? a **White `#ffffff` rounded square** holding the line icon (Brand Blue stroke), **vertically centered** on the box and **horizontally centered on the box's left edge**
The white badge **mirrors the same accent shape at smaller scale**, `border-radius: 20px 4px 20px 4px;`
**Drop shadow (mandatory):** the white icon badge **must carry a subtle drop shadow** so it lifts off the blue box

assets.description: Fluid wave graphic, Sunshine/Gold colorway, long variant; top layer (Gold) at 70% transparency over base wave (Sunshine).

quotes: Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
Construction: top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue)

assets.description: Fluid wave graphic, Sunshine/Gold colorway, short variant; top layer (Gold) at 70% transparency over base wave (Sunshine).

quotes: Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
Construction: top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue)

assets.description: Fluid wave graphic, Sky Blue/Deep Blue colorway, long variant; top layer (Sky Blue) at 70% transparency over base wave (Deep Blue).

quotes: Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
Construction: top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue)

assets.description: Fluid wave graphic, Sky Blue/Deep Blue colorway, short variant; top layer (Sky Blue) at 70% transparency over base wave (Deep Blue).

quotes: Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
Construction: top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue)

assets.description: Masthead gradient (Sunshine → light gold, horizontal) with the LISRAYA logo mark placed at the lightest end; approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

quotes: **Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end**
**Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

assets.description: LISRAYA logo icon mark; the icon's 70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a gold must be maintained in all instances, including when the mark is used as a pattern/graphic.

quotes: The logo icon's **70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances** (logo, and when the mark is used as a pattern/graphic).

assets.description: Approved CTA shape/treatment for internal banners: rounded rectangle SVG (180x59px) filled with a linear gradient from #FFDF55 to #FAA21B.

quotes: use this shape and treatment for CTAs:
<svg width="180" height="59" viewBox="0 0 180 59" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

assets.description: Core container device: rectangle with selectively enlarged opposite corner radii (asymmetric accent shape) used to house callout text and photography, in large/banner/callout size variants at a 5:1 radius ratio.

quotes: A rectangle with **selectively enlarged opposite corner radii**; the other two corners keep a slight radius. Used to house callout text and photography.
Approved radius pairs (print): **1.25" & 0.0625"** (large containers/photos), **0.5" & 0.0625"** (banners), **0.4375" & 0.0625"** (small callout boxes).

assets.description: Warm, realistic patient lifestyle photography — everyday activities such as walking the dog, beach, BBQ — conveying return to everyday life; housed in the accent-shape crop.

quotes: Photography: **warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery** — real moments of simple, everyday activity (walking the dog, beach, BBQ).
Images are housed in the **Accent shape** (§2.5) — asymmetric rounded-corner crops, not plain rectangles or circles.

assets.description: Icon family/style: minimal line illustration, consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work; default Brand Blue stroke on light backgrounds, minimum render 32x32px.

quotes: Style: **minimal line illustration** for clarity and quick recall. New icons are permitted but **must match this stylistic approach** (consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work).
[GENERAL: minimum render size 32×32px in email; default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds.]

assets.description: Chart/table container panel: Light Blue fill with a Brand Blue rounded header bar, uniform rounded corners (12px) on all four corners.

quotes: Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
**Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners** (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]

subtypes.best_for: Internal-use banner with locked color hierarchy, headline/body fonts, and CTA shape.

quotes:
The three approved brand colors in hierarchy order are: (1) 
#00529B Deep Blue (dominant), (2) 
#FAA31B Amber Orange (secondary accent), (3) 
#FFC60A Golden Yellow (tertiary accent).

Agenda, is the primary headline font
and should be used for all headlines and headers.
use this shape and treatment for CTAs:

subtypes.name: Internal Banner

templates.body: Talk to your doctor about how LISRAYA can help Visit LISRAYA.com  ❯

quotes:
<mj-section
    background-url="https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png"
    background-size="cover"
    background-repeat="no-repeat"
    background-position="center center"
    background-color="#faa31b"
    padding="48px 25px 56px 25px">

templates.description: Full-width banner with a centered headline and single centered CTA button overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient background image, with Sunshine solid-fill fallback.

quotes: ### [IMPORTANT] Gradient Callout CTA Section Rule
A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.

templates.name: Gradient Callout CTA Section
templates.notes: Background may be skipped only in rare cases; when skipped, keep background-color, headline color, button color and mandatory button radius identical.

templates.body: These improvements occurred as early as four weeks after starting treatment, and they continued getting better through the end of the 52-week study.

quotes: <mj-section background-color="#ffffff" padding="16px 25px">

templates.description: Light-blue accent-shape box with a short blue headline and a white icon badge that straddles the box's left edge, used for supporting proof-point statements.

quotes: ### [IMPORTANT] Icon Callout Box Rule
A **light-blue accent-shape box** containing a short blue headline, with a **white icon badge that straddles the box's left edge**

templates.name: Icon Callout Box
templates.notes: Outlook (Word engine) ignores position:absolute; brand-safe fallback is to pre-composite the badge as a transparent PNG.
